title: Mirror email to Dropdown
excerpt: We are trying to take our mirrored email column and have it populate into a dropdown column. I have been trying to work with Autoboost but the webhook is failing. I have reached out and the developer is working to figure…

posts.author: cobrien (cobrien)
posts.cookedHtml: We are trying to take our mirrored email column and have it populate into a dropdown column. I have been trying to work with Autoboost but the webhook is failing. I have reached out and the developer is working to figure out what is going on. In the meantime I figured it couldn’t hurt to see if there were other suggestions. Thank you.

posts.author: HarjotB (Harjot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi cobrien - We have been able to get around similar situations by using make.com. Please let me know if you would like further details.

Thanks

posts.author: cobrien (cobrien)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please. I’m willing to try anything.

posts.author: HarjotB (Harjot)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure. Pls ping me on harjotb@creativebits.us for a meeting on Wednesday and I can do a screen share.

posts.author: cobrien (cobrien)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Yes things have been taken care of.

Thank you,
